raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "db/assessments/raw_data.csv", "issue": "18.7% of records have invalid response timestamps (<1s or >2h), risking IRT model integrity", "recommended_fix": "Implement data validation filter to exclude implausible response times before calibration"}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "IRT calibration process", "issue": "12% of items show low discrimination (<0.3), undermining adaptive testing validity", "recommended_fix": "Flag low-discrimination items for review; consider removal or revision"}, {"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "Adaptability competency", "issue": "Question 17 exhibits outlier response time (avg +3.2σ), suggesting cognitive overload or poor phrasing", "recommended_fix": "Review item content and simplify language"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["adr/ADR-004-assessment-engine.md", "scripts/audit_dif_bias.py"]}

findings.issue: 18.7% of records have invalid response timestamps (<1s or >2h), risking IRT model integrity
findings.recommended_fix: Implement data validation filter to exclude implausible response times before calibration

findings.issue: 12% of items show low discrimination (<0.3), undermining adaptive testing validity
findings.recommended_fix: Flag low-discrimination items for review; consider removal or revision

findings.issue: Question 17 exhibits outlier response time (avg +3.2σ), suggesting cognitive overload or poor phrasing
findings.recommended_fix: Review item content and simplify language
